title: salix pedicellaris
intro: Salix pedicellaris, also known as dwarf willow or gray-leaved willow, is a small shrub or deciduous tree that belongs to the willow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salix pedicellaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Salix pedicellaris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
